title: erythrococca neglecta
intro: Erythrococca neglecta is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family, which is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Erythrococca neglecta include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimalarial properties. Erythrococca neglecta can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its potential medicinal benefits to be utilized in a variety of forms.
